title: Beet Salad Skewers
ingredients: 8 oz package of cooked baby beets
8 oz goat cheese, cut into small cubes
instructions:
Cut each beet in half.
Build the skewers in the following manor, 1 beet half, 2 leaves of baby spinach folded in half and small chunk of goat cheese.
Plate the skewers and drizzle with the balsamic glaze and sprinkle with the crushed walnuts.
